test-case.name: Paiement valide avec les informations obligatoires uniquement @nominal @smoke
test-case.title: Paiement valide avec les informations obligatoires uniquement @nominal @smoke

step.name: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" avec un payload minimal valide ""
step.title: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" avec un payload minimal valide ""

step.name: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"amount":100,"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}
step.title: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"amount":100,"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}

step.name: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 200 ""
step.title: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 200 ""

step.name: I see response code is 200
step.title: I see response code is 200

failure.message:
Response code is not the same as expected
401 !== 200
failure.stack-trace:
AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Response code is not the same as expected
401 !== 200
at JSONResponse.seeResponseCodeIs (file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/helper/JSONResponse.js:97:12) at HelperStep.run (file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/step/helper.js:28:49) at file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/step/record.js:46:26

test-case.name: Paiement refuse avec une authentification invalide @security @error
test-case.title: Paiement refuse avec une authentification invalide @security @error

step.name: Given je suis authentifie avec des credentials invalides ""
step.title: Given je suis authentifie avec des credentials invalides ""

step.name: I have request headers {"Authorization":"Basic aW52YWxpZDppbnZhbGlk"}
step.title: I have request headers {"Authorization":"Basic aW52YWxpZDppbnZhbGlk"}

step.name: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" avec un payload minimal valide ""
step.title: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" avec un payload minimal valide ""

step.name: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"amount":100,"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}
step.title: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"amount":100,"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}

step.name: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 401 ""
step.title: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 401 ""

step.name: I see response code is 401
step.title: I see response code is 401

test-case.name: Paiement refuse avec un champ obligatoire manquant @error @validation
test-case.title: Paiement refuse avec un champ obligatoire manquant @error @validation

step.name: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" sans le champ "amount" ""
step.title: When j'envoie une requete POST sur "/v1/connector/order" sans le champ "amount" ""

step.name: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}
step.title: I send post request "/v1/connector/order", {"order":{"order_id":"ORDER_1783467137976","transaction_type":"Debit","price":{"currency":"EUR"}},"pos_technical_info":{"device_information":{"serial_number":"1850320198","manufacturer":"PAX"},"terminal_transaction_display":{"protocol":"AppNepting"}}}

step.name: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 400 ""
step.title: Then la reponse doit avoir le statut 400 ""

step.name: I see response code is 400
step.title: I see response code is 400

failure.message:
Response code is not the same as expected
401 !== 400
failure.stack-trace:
AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Response code is not the same as expected
401 !== 400
at JSONResponse.seeResponseCodeIs (file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/helper/JSONResponse.js:97:12) at HelperStep.run (file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/step/helper.js:28:49) at file:///C:/Users/PC/Desktop/hipay/hipay-Analyst/node_modules/codeceptjs/lib/step/record.js:46:26

test-case.title: Paiement refuse avec un payload vide @error @validation

step.name: I send get request "/v1/connector/healthcheck"
step.title: I send get request "/v1/connector/healthcheck"
